description: react-datepicker pr-6073: in range mode across multiple months, the in-selecting-range hover highlight is wrongly applied to filler day cells that belong to an adjacent month; a cell must only join the selecting-range highlight when it actually belongs to the month its grid represents (real react-datepicker issue)
